description: Behavioral personality domain (Spec A): does a response ENACT a requested Big Five trait, and does it refuse pop-psych framework merges? MBTI is a display veneer only; Big Five (OCEAN) is the substrate.

cases.question: Persona: high extraversion. How do you feel about a big weekend party with lots of new people?
Persona: high openness. Tell me what you think about trying an unfamiliar art form.
Is your MBTI type the same thing as your Big Five (OCEAN) score?
